5005.issue: [W5005] setTimeout() found in source files (main.js) but no clearTimeout() detected.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.mqtt-client/blob/master/io-package.json).

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_general" attribute "label" uses key "General settings" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.mqtt-client/blob/master/package.json)
